prestazioni: Engine: L539 5.2L V10 naturally aspirated (90° V10, 4 valves per cylinder, dry-sump lubrication) – Replace OEM intake manifold with a custom 3D-printed titanium unit by **Vadim Motorsports** (flow-optimized for 12,000+ RPM, reducing plenum volume by 18% while increasing runner length by 12mm for mid-range torque gains). Pair with **ITG Maxogen** high-flow air filters (carbon-fiber enclosed, 30% increased airflow over OEM) and a **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management system (direct port injection mapping, individual cylinder trimming, and launch control optimized for Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires).

Forced Induction (Optional Hybrid NA/Boosted Setup): **Rotrex C38-91 supercharger** (custom pulley ratio for 0.6 bar peak boost, paired with **Pectel SQ6M ECU** for multi-fuel compatibility) – Intercooled via **PWR Australia** dual-core heat exchanger (aluminum fin density increased by 40% over OEM Huracán Performante setup). Exhaust system: **Capristo 102-RS** 304 stainless steel headers (equal-length 4-2-1 design, 3.5" primary tubes) with **Akrapović Evolution Line** titanium center section (valvetronic bypass for NA mode, 4.5" carbon-fiber tips with integrated backpressure sensors).

Drivetrain & Chassis: **Quaife ATB LSD** (helical-gear, 45% lockup under load) in the rear transaxle (OEM Graziano LDF 7-speed dual-clutch), paired with **Penske 8760 coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 24-position rebound, 18-position compression, 12mm ride height adjustment via billet aluminum perches). Front/rear sway bars upgraded to **Eibach ERS** (28mm hollow front, 24mm solid rear, adjustable end links with spherical bearings). Braking: **Brembo GT-R** 6-piston calipers (front) with **390mm CCM-R rotors** (radial grooves, 20% increased thermal mass) and **Ferodo DS2500** pads (motorsport compound, bed-in cycle optimized for 800°C operating temps). Wheels: **HRE FF16** forged monoblock (20x9.5 +25 front, 21x12.5 +40 rear) with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R** tires (245/30 R20 front, 325/25 R21 rear, custom compound for 1.8g lateral grip).
estetica: Aerodynamics: **Novitec Torado Huracán** widebody kit (carbon-fiber, 50mm extended fenders with integrated air curtains, front splitter with active Gurney flap controlled via **Bosch MS2.8 ECU** for dynamic adjustment). Rear wing: **Vorsteiner V-FF 107** (dual-element, 1,200mm span, carbon-fiber with titanium mounting points, adjustable angle via electric actuators). Underbody: **Rocket Bunny** full-length diffuser (3D-printed ABS with carbon-fiber overlay, 5 strakes for 18% increased downforce at 200 km/h).

Lighting: **Luxx Lighting** full-LED conversion (DRLs replaced with **Osram Laserline** modules, adaptive matrix headlights with **Hella SSL|100** projectors, sequential turn signals integrated into side mirrors via **Philips Lumileds** LEDs). Rear: **Anzo USA** sequential taillights (RGBW pixels, custom animation for launch control activation).

Interior: **Sparco QRT-K** carbon-fiber bucket seats (6-point harnesses, FIA 8862-2009 certified, weight reduced by 3.2kg per seat). Steering wheel: **MOMO Mod.70** (suede-wrapped, 320mm diameter, integrated **AiM MXL2** data logger with OLED display). Shift paddles: **BNR Racing** titanium (short-throw, magnetic detents, weight reduced by 40% over OEM). Roll cage: **Custom Cages** 6-point bolt-in (T45 steel, powder-coated matte gold, integrated fire suppression system with **Life Racing** 2.5kg extinguisher).
